title: senecio malvifolius
intro: Senecio malvifolius, also known as the Mallow-leaved Ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The plant is rich in flavonoids, triterpenoids, and sesquiterpenes, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting liver health. Senecio malvifolius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, offering a versatile solution for its medicinal properties.
